summary: Exposed Protocol Labs deliverables (agent.json and agent_log.json) as retrievable product surfaces. Created download.ts with getAgentManifestJson, getRunLogJson, and triggerJsonDownload utilities. Added AgentIdentitySection component for agent detail pages and a DetailPage for cockpit-based agent identity viewing. The run log export applies Venice private reasoning redaction before download.

strengths: Clean separation between data retrieval (getAgentManifestJson/getRunLogJson) and browser download (triggerJsonDownload)
Venice private reasoning redaction is applied at the download layer ensuring operator-visible artifacts are safe
Agent detail page extended with identity section showing ERC-8004 status, manifest, and download buttons
Good error handling with descriptive error messages for missing identity/manifest cases

testCoverage.notes: 10 tests covering manifest retrieval, run log export, redaction integration, missing-data error paths, and download trigger.
